name: screenshot-pop
description: Turn PRs into launch-ready product visuals from real app surfaces.

interface.shortDescription: Turn PRs into launch-ready product visuals.
interface.longDescription: Give your coding agent a PR visual skill. The agent reads PR context locally, captures the real product UI, and uses Screenshot Pop MCP to create one grounded PNG/SVG plus a PR comment draft without sending source code, raw diffs, file contents, or changed file lists.
